title: User
description: Represents a user account in an Atlassian organization.

account_status.description: The current status of the account.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

picture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

last_active.description: The last time the user was active.

created.description: When the user account was created.

product_access.description: Products the user has access to.
